response: {"commands":[{"command_template":"hiseq_demux {raw_fastq}","description":"Standard Illumina HiSeq demultiplexing of raw FASTQ reads based on sequencing barcodes.","required_inputs":["Raw FASTQ reads from HiSeq sequencing"],"outputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ files"],"parameters":{}},{"command_template":"eclip_demux --inline_barcodes {barcodes} --append_umi_to_readname {demultiplexed_fastq}","description":"Custom demultiplexing of eCLIP libraries using distinct inline barcodes, with the random-mer (UMI) appended to the read name for later PCR duplicate removal.","required_inputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ files (from HiSeq demultiplexing)","Inline barcode sequences"],"outputs":["Demultiplexed FASTQ files with random-mer (UMI) appended to read names"],"parameters":{"--inline_barcodes":"{barcodes}","--append_umi_to_readname":"True"}}]}
